g.text: Diabetes-related (broadened: UCOD 7 + UCOD 9 + LMF flag, 15y cap, AUC at 5y, 10y, 14.5y)

div.p: 5 MetS components + age, sex, race. PSU x stratum 5-fold GroupKFold. Default hyperparameters.
Continuous score via triangular areal similarity from the 5 MetS components
CART from B9 paper, left subtree as single safety-zone leaf (p = 0.137)
ACC/AHA 2013 pooled cohort equations, 4 sex- and race-specific eqs

g.text: ML upper bound (5 AUC pts of headroom)
